name: SOL Value Recovery Scale-In v1
thesis: SOL 4h is the best-fit primary lane for a value-recovery scale-in concept because the live program asks for improved confirmation across bars instead of one-shot all-in timing. The edge should come from recovering value after dislocation, then adding only when confirmation strengthens.
edge_mechanism: value recovery continuation with staged entry
invalidation_condition: Abort if recovery setups are too rare, if the add-on confirmation contradicts the first reclaim, or if the later add-on leg degrades expectancy after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price dislocates from value, reclaims the key reference, then confirms on the following bar(s) strongly enough to justify adding rather than entering full size immediately.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Mixed chop/transition markets often punish perfect bottom-picking but reward entering in stages once recovery is actually being accepted.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: SOL 4h is the cleanest lane for this mechanism because the recovery needs enough amplitude and structure to support multi-bar confirmation and staged entry.

indicator_role_map.PLUS_DI_14/MINUS_DI_14: direction confirmation for the scale-in leg

pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If recovery bars are only dead-cat bounces and not genuine acceptance, the add-on leg will amplify a weak thesis.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If the base reclaim works but add-ons hurt expectancy, keep the base entry and tighten the confirmation required for the scale-in.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; reclaim, confirmation improvement, and DI agreement are sequential rather than conflicting
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by broad recovery thresholds instead of rare extreme oversold events

trade_management.add_on_condition: Next bar closes in trade direction and RSI_14 improves by at least 2 points while DI confirmation persists

long: Stop loss: 1.0 * ATR_14 below blended entry
short: Stop loss: 1.0 * ATR_14 above blended entry
